case_title: GARCIA, EDWIN et al VS RAYGOZA, MANUEL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GARCIA, EDWIN JIMENEZ, ROSALBA AS TO DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, EDWIN JIMENEZ, ROSALBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, MANUEL $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,805.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PLAINTIFF EDWIN GARCIA IN THE SUM OF $1850.00 AND FOR PLAINTIFF ROSALBA JIMENEZ IN TEH SUM OF $1850.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, MANUEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, MANUEL
